sections.heading: Stop Wasting Budget on B2C Platforms. Meet Biscuit.
sections.subheading: The intent-driven B2B advertising platform designed specifically to bypass traditional keyword bidding and plug directly into your CRM. Discover a smarter way to acquire high-quality B2B leads.

sections.label: The Problem with Meta & Google
sections.heading: They are fundamentally B2C platforms. When B2B marketers use them, they waste enormous amounts of budget on broad keywords and demographic targeting, resulting in low-quality leads.

sections.label: The Biscuit Solution
sections.heading: Biscuit bypasses traditional keyword bidding. It plugs directly into a B2B company CRM to identify ideal customer profiles, tracks buying intent signals across the professional web, and serves ads exclusively to decision-makers actively in market for your solution.

sections.label: EVERYTHING YOU NEED
sections.heading: Why Top B2B Companies Choose Biscuit

capabilities.title: CRM Integration
capabilities.description: Seamlessly connects with your CRM to uncover the ideal customer profiles based on historical data. Stop guessing who your audience is.

capabilities.title: Intent Tracking
capabilities.description: Monitors buying intent signals across the professional web, capturing data points from high-value prospects. We intercept them at the critical decision moment.

capabilities.title: Eliminate Waste
capabilities.description: No more broad keywords. Biscuit ensures your budget is only spent on decision-makers actively seeking your product.

items.title: B2B Marketers
items.subtitle: Companies with high LTV sales
items.description: Biscuit is architected for B2B marketers who are tired of the inefficiencies of consumer-centric ad platforms. If your sales cycle involves multiple decision-makers and high customer lifetime value, Biscuit is your growth engine.

sections.heading: Ready to Dominate B2B Advertising?
sections.subheading: Join the beta today and see how intent-driven targeting transforms your pipeline.
